2605.18048.title: DocOS: Towards Proactive Document-Guided Actions in GUI Agents
2605.18048.paper_summary: While Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents have shown promising performance in automated device interaction, they primarily depend on static parametric knowledge from pre-training or instruction tuning. This reliance fundamentally limits their ability to handle long-tailed tasks that require explicit procedural knowledge absent from model parameters, often forcing agents to resort to inefficient and brittle trial-and-error exploration. To mitigate this limitation, we introduce \textbf{Proactive Document-Guided Action} for GUI agents in dynamic, open-web environments, a novel paradigm that mirrors human problem-solving by enabling agents to autonomously search for relevant documentation to resolve long-tailed tasks. To evaluate agents' capability in this paradigm, we propose \textbf{DocOS}, a benchmark designed to assess document-guided problem solving in fully interactive environments. DocOS requires agents to autonomously navigate a web browser, locate relevant online documentation, comprehend procedural instructions, and faithfully ground them into executable GUI actions. Extensive experiments reveal that progress is strictly constrained by dual bottlenecks: agents struggle to reliably locate relevant information during proactive search and frequently fail to faithfully ground retrieved instructions into precise actions, pointing toward document-guided interaction as a crucial pathway for enabling self-evolving GUI agents in dynamic environments.
2605.18048.paper_summary_zh: 雖然圖形用戶界面（GUI）代理在自動化設備互動中顯示出良好的性能，但它們主要依賴於來自預訓練或指令調整的靜態參數知識。這種依賴根本上限制了它們處理需要明確程序知識的長尾任務的能力，而這些知識在模型參數中缺失，經常迫使代理訴諸於低效且脆弱的試錯探索。為了減輕這一限制，我們引入了\textbf{主動文檔引導行動}，針對在動態開放網絡環境中的GUI代理，這是一種新穎的範式，通過使代理能夠自主搜尋相關文檔以解決長尾任務，模仿人類的問題解決過程。為了評估代理在這一範式中的能力，我們提出了\textbf{DocOS}，這是一個旨在評估在完全互動環境中基於文檔的問題解決的基準。DocOS要求代理自主導航網頁瀏覽器，定位相關的在線文檔，理解程序指令，並將其忠實地轉化為可執行的GUI行動。廣泛的實驗顯示，進展受到雙重瓶頸的嚴格限制：代理在主動搜索過程中難以可靠地定位相關信息，並且經常無法將檢索到的指令忠實地轉化為精確的行動，這表明基於文檔的互動是促進動態環境中自我演化GUI代理的關鍵途徑。
2605.18048.author: Jingjing Liu et.al.
2605.18048.authors: Jingjing Liu, Ziye Huang, Zihao Cheng, Zeming Liu, Jiahong Wu, Yuhang Guo, Kehai Chen, Yunhong Wang, Haifeng Wang
